Read the Docs sidebar

With Python

Trafilatura can be used from the command-line or as a Python library.

The Python programming language¶

Trafilatura requires Python 3.10 or later.

Step-by-step¶

Quickstart¶

import trafilatura
downloaded = trafilatura.fetch_url('https://example.com')
print(trafilatura.extract(downloaded))

Extraction functions¶

The main function is extract().

Output¶

Output can be plain text, JSON, XML, or Markdown.

Examples¶

# some formatting preserved in basic XML structure
result = trafilatura.extract(downloaded, output_format='xml')

Extraction settings¶

Settings control extraction behavior.

Function parameters¶

The extract() function accepts many parameters.
